2606.09826.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
2606.09826.paper_summary: Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent classes (commercial VLMs, open-weight VLMs, and specialized game policies) on the same footing. We address these gaps with OmniGameArena, a real-time benchmark of twelve newly built Unreal Engine 5 games spanning Solo (7), PvP (3), and Coop (2) with unified action interfaces, and the Improvement Dynamics Curve (IDC), an agentic-reflection harness in which a tool-using reflector LLM autonomously refines a bounded skill prompt across multiple rounds. Beyond cold-start leaderboard scores, IDC exposes two additional observables for each (agent, game) pair: how the score evolves across reflection rounds, and how the learned skill behaves on held-out task variants. We report these observables for twelve VLM agents on the cold-start leaderboard and four top agents under IDC.
2606.09826.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLM）代理在互動遊戲環境中的應用日益增多。<lb/>然而，VLM 代理的遊戲基準通常僅報告每個（代理，遊戲）對的單一首次嘗試得分，專注於單一代理的獨自遊玩，且缺乏統一的評估異質代理類別（商業 VLM、開放權重 VLM 和專門遊戲策略）的協議。<lb/>我們通過 OmniGameArena 解決這些問題，這是一個實時基準，涵蓋了十二個新建的虛幻引擎 5 遊戲，涵蓋獨自（7）、玩家對玩家（3）和合作（2）的統一動作介面，以及改進動態曲線（IDC），這是一種代理反思工具，其中使用工具的反射 LLM 自主地在多輪中細化有界技能提示。<lb/>除了冷啟動排行榜得分外，IDC 還為每個（代理，遊戲）對提供了兩個額外的可觀察指標：得分在反思輪中的演變，以及學習到的技能在保留任務變體上的表現。<lb/>我們報告了這十二個 VLM 代理在冷啟動排行榜上的可觀察指標，以及四個在 IDC 下的頂尖代理。
2606.09826.author: Mingxian Lin et.al.
2606.09826.authors: Mingxian Lin, Shengju Qian, Yuqi Liu, Yi-Hua Huang, Yiyu Wang, Wei Huang, Yitang Li, Fan Zhang, Zeyu Hu, Lingting Zhu, Xin Wang, Xiaojuan Qi
